title: No Difference I' Th' Dark.
content:
Night makes no difference 'twixt the priest and clerk;
    Joan as my lady is as good i' th' dark.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "No Difference I' Th' Dark."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
